visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young female presenter with long dark hair, wearing a white puffed-sleeve blouse and a black pinafore dress, stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse aisle. She holds a plastic-wrapped two-pack of Kirkland Signature Salsa jars. The background features tall orange warehouse shelves stocked with glass jars. Yellow text overlays and the Costco logo are visible at the top. (2) She brings the salsa jars closer to the camera lens, gesturing with her hands while talking enthusiastically. Her facial expression is animated with a wide smile and expressive eyes. The jars are brown with dark lids. Colorful "repurchase" text bubbles in blue and pink float around her. (3) The camera switches to a close-up focus on the back of the salsa bottle. The woman's hands point to the printed ingredient list which is written in Traditional Chinese characters. The background remains the blurry warehouse setting. White subtitles appear at the bottom of the frame to transcribe her speech. (4) The perspective returns to a medium shot of the woman holding the salsa. She continues to explain the product's uses, like pairing it with pizza. The lighting is consistent, highlighting the texture of her clothing and the glossy surface of the jars. More "good to eat" graphics appear. (5) The final phase shows the woman pointing towards the price tag on the orange shelf rack. The tag displays the number 389 in large black digits. She maintains a high-energy posture, nodding at the camera to reinforce her recommendation. Large yellow captions emphasize the cost-effectiveness of the product.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 回購回購再回購. [Variety]: 回購. (2) [Subtitle]: 妹妹再度回購. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 回購. (3) [Subtitle]: 莎莎醬 上次2罐吃完了. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 回購之王. (4) [Subtitle]: 還是很愛這個. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (5) [Subtitle]: 拿來配披薩好吃 單吃也好吃. (6) [Subtitle]: 而且呢 我們後面看著他的那個成分表. (7) [Subtitle]: 感覺好像還不錯 還蠻乾淨的. (8) [Subtitle]: 他成分表長什麼樣 他的成分表是這樣子. (9) [Subtitle]: 化學的東西沒有太多啊. (10) [Subtitle]: 第一個是調製的番茄 墨西哥辣椒洋蔥這樣子. (11) [Subtitle]: 最重要是因為這個醬太好吃 妹妹真的很喜歡. [Variety]: 太好吃. (12) [Subtitle]: 配什麼都好吃 感覺伴義大利麵也好吃. (13) [Subtitle]: 非常好吃 這個醬我覺得是好市多必買神物. (14) [Subtitle]: 科克蘭莎莎醬. (15) [Subtitle]: 389兩罐 所以一罐不用200塊.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character in the foreground.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a white puffed-sleeve blouse and a black pinafore vest dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with high orange industrial shelving units stacked with rows of jarred sauces and glass containers.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic female voice opens with a high-pitched, enthusiastic repetition of the word 'Huìgòu.' A bright, mid-tempo pop BGM with a steady 4/4 drum beat and synth melodies plays at a moderate volume. There is a clean studio-like vocal quality with high articulation clarity. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers as a graphic appears visually. The speaker's voice maintains a high arousal level and positive valence as she describes finishing two jars. The BGM continues with a cheerful, Major-key tonality, blending seamlessly with the fast-paced speech. (3) The acoustic texture remains consistent with low indoor room tone. A subtle plastic rustling sound is heard as the jars are handled. The speaker's tone shifts to an informative, professional narrative style while discussing ingredients, showing high pitch variability and moderate loudness. (4) A soft 'pop' SFX occurs during a visual cutaway. The BGM remains constant, while the female voice delivery stays rapid and fluent with few pauses. The spectral brightness is high, emphasizing the crispness of the vocal phonemes and the high-end frequencies of the music. (5) The speaker's volume increases slightly for the final price announcement, conveying a sense of authoritative recommendation. The BGM concludes with a final melodic phrase before the audio track cuts cleanly. No significant ambient noise or technical distortion is present throughout the recording.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Personal Testimony -> Ingredient Verification -> Pricing/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote Kirkland Signature Salsa sold at Costco by sharing a personal success story of multiple repurchases and verifying its ingredient quality to encourage viewers to buy the product as a 'must-have' item.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product presentation, mention of specific store (Costco), and positive personal recommendation of a house brand (Kirkland Signature).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The high visual and audio density, combined with frequent text overlays, typical of social media trending recommendation videos.
